data.title: Seaspan updates on SAVER program launched in 2013, focusing on vessel retrofits to improve efficiency and sustainability.
data.description: Seaspan, based in Vancouver, British Columbia, announced on October 17, 2025, their update on the SAVER (Seaspan Action on Vessel Energy Reduction) program initiated in 2013. The program set a precedent for prioritizing efficiency and sustainability. It was launched ahead of environmental regulations that later influenced the industry’s direction.
UN Security Council UNANIMOUSLY ADOPTS resolution renewing the sanctions regime, including asset freezes, travel bans and an arms embargo for another year.

data.title: Koryx Copper Inc. announces shareholders vote on transfer to Luxembourg with 51.6M shares represented, 53.75% of total shares.
data.description: Koryx Copper Inc., listed on TSX-V as KRY and NSX as KYX, disclosed the outcomes of its recent special shareholder meeting held on October 15, 2025, in Vancouver, BC. The purpose was to approve the shift of the company's registered office to the Grand Duchy of Luxembourg, converting the legal entity to Koryx Copper S.A., a public limited company. This move also involved altering the nationality of the company. The meeting was attended by holders of 51,606,515 common shares, representing about 53.75% of the total outstanding common shares during that period.

data.title: LTC price hovers at $90.78 near lower Bollinger Band with RSI hinting oversold bounce, indicating possible short-term uptrend.
data.description: Currently, the price of LTC is hovering at $90.78, close to critical Bollinger Band support following a period of decline. Technical signals are pointing towards a possible short-term turnaround.

data.title: Travelex Insurance Services wins Gold Magellan Award for Best Travel Insurance Campaign, recognized by Travel Weekly.
data.description: Travelex Insurance Services Inc., based in Omaha, Nebraska, was honored with a prestigious Gold Magellan Award by Travel Weekly on October 17, 2025. The award recognizes their excellence in the Best Travel Insurance Advertising/Marketing Campaign category. The winning campaign, titled "For every traveler and every...", has showcased innovation and creativity in reaching a wide audience. This accolade underscores the company's success in the travel industry, further solidifying their position as a leader in the market.

data.title: Bitcoin Cash drops 8.2% to $467.40 on economic concerns following Fed rate cuts & Bitcoin decline.
data.description: The price of BCH has decreased to $467.40 amidst a recent decline in the broader crypto market. This decrease was triggered by Bitcoin falling below a key support level, as well as the Federal Reserve unexpectedly resuming rate cuts, which has raised concerns about the economy.

data.title: Bike and scootersharing telematics market to see a surge to 37.8 million micromobility vehicles by 2029 - ResearchAndMarkets.com.
data.description: A recent report, "Bike and Scootersharing Telematics Market - 4th Edition," now available on ResearchAndMarkets.com, predicts significant growth in the number of deployed vehicles for bikesharing and scootersharing services. The report estimates that the number of vehicles in bikesharing schemes will increase at a CAGR of 5.9%, rising from 25.7 million in 2024 to 34.3 million by 2029. Similarly, the number of scooters offered by scootersharing services is projected to grow at a CAGR of 12.8%, expanding from 1.9 million in 2024 to 3.5 million vehicles by 2029. This report provides valuable insights into these trends and the factors driving the growth of these sharing platforms.

data.title: ATOM price falls 2.7% to $3.18 post Binance security scare; broader crypto market also affected.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Cosmos (ATOM) is currently trading at $3.18 amidst market uncertainty in the broader crypto industry. The volatility follows a recent trading glitch on Binance which caused several major altcoins to briefly plummet to zero.

data.title: Supercapacitors market forecasted to reach $27.99 billion by 2035, with a CAGR of 15.74%. Innovations drive growth.
data.description: A report titled "Supercapacitors Market - A Global and Regional Analysis" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The Supercapacitors Market, valued at USD 6.49 billion in 2025, is expected to reach USD 27.99 billion by 2035, with a projected CAGR of 15.74%. This market is essential for modern energy storage solutions and is crucial in various applications.

data.title: MrBeast seeks to launch MrBeast Financial with a trademark filed for a crypto exchange and payment service, facing regulatory challenges.
data.description: Popular YouTube personality MrBeast has successfully trademarked his cryptocurrency exchange application, signaling his intentions to launch MrBeast Financial. However, despite this achievement, there are regulatory obstacles that need to be addressed before the app can be officially launched. MrBeast's move reflects the growing trend of influencers entering the digital finance space. The trademark signifies his foray into this industry, which boasts an estimated market value of billions of dollars. The launch of MrBeast Financial is eagerly anticipated by his millions of followers, but it may take some time before the regulatory hurdles are overcome.

data.title: Ondo Finance urges SEC to delay Nasdaq's tokenized securities proposal, citing potential bias towards major investors.
data.description: Ondo has written a letter to the US regulatory authority expressing concerns about Nasdaq’s proposal. They contend that Nasdaq's plan is based on undisclosed settlement information that may provide advantages to larger entities.

data.title: Global carbon offset/credit market valued at USD 2.44B in 2025, projected to reach USD 31.04B by 2034 with a CAGR of 32.63%.
data.description: A new report titled "Carbon Offset/Credit Market: Global and Regional Analysis" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's listings. The market was worth USD 2.44 billion in 2025 and is estimated to grow to USD 31.04 billion by 2034, with a projected Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 32.63%. This sector is a significant part of the overall carbon footprint market.

data.title: Atlas Energy Solutions Inc. (NYSE: AESI) will release Q3 2025 earnings on Nov 3, 2025, with a conference call at 7:00am CT.
data.description: ATLAS Energy Solutions Inc. disclosed the timing for its third quarter 2025 earnings release and conference call. The company (NYSE: AESI) will release its third-quarter earnings after the market closes on November 3, 2025. A conference call to discuss the financial results is scheduled for 7:00 am Central Time (8:00 am Eastern Time) on the same day. Atlas Energy Solutions Inc. invites investors and stakeholders to participate in the conference call to gain insights into the company's performance during the third quarter of 2025.

data.title: PPMD celebrates 20th Sam's Night event in Dallas, raising funds for Duchenne & Becker care, research; Rockwall family leads.
data.description: The Killian family from Rockwall, Texas, has reached a significant fundraising milestone with their annual Sam's Night event. This event benefits Parent Project Muscular Dystrophy (PPMD), the primary non-profit organization in the U.S. dedicated to assisting individuals with Duchenne and Becker muscular dystrophy. This achievement underscores the family's commitment to supporting PPMD's mission of providing care, research, and resources for those affected by these conditions.

data.title: Broad Arrow is hosting an auction at Wynn Las Vegas on October 31, featuring collectible cars like Bugatti Veyron and Mercedes-Benz 300 SL Roadster, with a complete digital catalog now live.
data.description: The digital catalog for the upcoming October 31 auction is now available, featuring a range of valuable items. The inaugural sale highlights include the Bugatti Veyron EB 16.4 Coupe, the Mercedes-Benz 300 SL Roadster, along with many other modern collectibles. This auction presents an opportunity for enthusiasts to bid on exclusive items and potential investments. Interested participants can view the complete catalog online. Mark your calendars for a chance to acquire these sought-after items on October 31.

data.title: Regional bank stocks rebounded as better-than-expected earnings eased credit fears. SPDR S&P Regional Banking ETF rose 1.1% after a 6.2% drop. Huntington Bancshares Inc. beat EPS estimate with 24.2% growth, reporting $2.13 billion in revenue, 13.9% higher than last year. Fifth Third Bancorp earned $0.93 per share, ahead of estimates.
data.description: Regional bank stocks bounced back on Friday after suffering steep losses the day before. The SPDR S&P Regional Banking ETF (NYSE: KRE) climbed 1.1% by 2 p.m. ET, following a 6.2% drop on Thursday, the largest decline since April. The rebound was fueled by strong earnings reports from small and mid-sized lenders, reassuring investors about earnings quality and credit trends. Several regional banks exceeded analysts' expectations, with Huntington Bancshares Inc. (NASDAQ: HBAN) reporting EPS of $0.41, surpassing the $0.37 estimate with a 24.2% year-over-year growth. Revenue reached $2.13 billion, a 13.9% rise from last year and 4.6% higher than forecasts. Fifth Third Bancorp (NASDAQ: FITB) also outperformed with earnings of $0.93 per share.
